name: k-horizon
description: Token-efficient, customizable AI coding assistant with inline edits, sidebar chat, composer, and autocomplete.

k-horizon.apiKey.description: API key for your selected provider (leave blank for Ollama).

k-horizon.stitchApiKey.description: Optional API Key for Google Labs Stitch integration.

k-horizon.baseURL.description: Custom API endpoint URL. If empty, uses standard defaults (e.g. localhost:11434 for Ollama).

k-horizon.chatModel.description: Model ID to use for Chat, Composer, and Inline Edits (e.g., gemini-1.5-flash, claude-3-5-sonnet, gpt-4o, codegemma).

k-horizon.plannerModel.description: Model ID to use for planning, routing, and tool choices in the agent loop.

k-horizon.coderModel.description: Model ID to use for code generation, edit_file, and write_file tasks.

k-horizon.autocompleteModel.description: Lightweight model ID for code completion suggestions.

k-horizon.visionModel.description: Model ID to use for vision-based page analysis and automation tasks.

k-horizon.enableAutocomplete.description: Enable ghost-text inline code completions as you type.

k-horizon.enableContinuousLearning.description: Enable continuous agent learning and self-improvement by reflecting on mistakes in the background.

k-horizon.maxContextTokens.description: Maximum number of code tokens to include in prompt context.

k-horizon.systemPrompt.description: Override the default system prompt for customization.

k-horizon.supabaseConnectionString.description: PostgreSQL connection string for Supabase database. Prefer using SecretStorage (DBClient.storeConnectionString) instead of settings.json to keep credentials out of source-control.

k-horizon.sandboxMode.description: Run terminal commands inside an ephemeral Docker container for security.

k-horizon.firecrawlApiKey.description: API Key for Firecrawl search and scrape service. If set, searches and scrapings will be routed via Firecrawl.

k-horizon.firecrawlBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the Firecrawl API.

k-horizon.aicreditsApiKey.description: API key for aicredits.in to query the baai/bge-en-icl embedding model.

k-horizon.useWorkspaceContext.description: Automatically retrieve and inject relevant workspace codebase context for queries.

k-horizon.autoApprove.description: Automatically approve high-confidence agent actions without prompting.

k-horizon.autoCompile.description: Automatically run compilation after edits to check for build errors.

k-horizon.autoTest.description: Automatically run unit tests after edits to verify correctness.

k-horizon.stepDebug.description: Enable step-by-step interactive debugging mode for tool execution.

k-horizon.enablePreemptiveDryRuns.description: Enable speculative dry run compilation of workspace files on every edit or write to prevent breaking changes.

k-horizon.customModels.description: Custom models with their own custom API URLs.

name.description: Display name of the custom model (e.g., 'My Ollama Llama3').

modelId.description: Model ID to send in requests (e.g., 'llama3').

provider.description: Which API protocol/format to use (OpenAI is default/standard).
